schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The One District One Product Awards (here in after, the 'Award') have been instituted by the **Department for the Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Government of India,** to acknowledge the extraordinary work done by States/ UTs, Districts, and Indian Missions Abroad, for the economic development of the State and contribute towards the realization of the Hon’ble Prime Minister’s vision of Atmanirbhar Bharat. **No. of Awardees** There will be total 38 awards under 5 heads (States/UTs, Districts, Indian Missions Abroad, E-Commerce platforms and Central Ministries/Departments) - 9 Awards for States/UTs - 12 Awards for Districts - 15 Awards for Indian Missions Abroad - 1 Award for E-Commerce platforms - 1 Award for Central Ministries/Departments - The above division is tentative and subject to change.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, each awardee will receive a commemorative trophy and certificate recognizing excellence in their respective award category. The award will reflect the recipient’s unique contribution to promoting One District One Product (ODOP) and will be customized according to the specific category.
schemeContent.exclusions_md: **Non-Eligible Applicants under the ODOP Awards:** 1. Private companies, individual artisans, and businesses cannot apply directly. 1. NGOs are not eligible to apply for the awards.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and celebrate the outstanding efforts of States, UTs, Districts, and Indian Missions Abroad in promoting local products. It also seeks to boost economic development and support the Hon’ble Prime Minister’s vision of Atmanirbhar Bharat.

children.text: The One District One Product Awards (here in after, the 'Award') have been instituted by the
Department for the Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), Ministry of Commerce and Industry, Government of India,

to acknowledge the extraordinary work done by States/ UTs, Districts, and Indian Missions Abroad, for the economic development of the State and contribute towards the realization of the Hon’ble Prime Minister’s vision of Atmanirbhar Bharat.
There will be total 38 awards under 5 heads (States/UTs, Districts, Indian Missions Abroad, E-Commerce platforms and Central Ministries/Departments)
The above division is tentative and subject to change.

Under this scheme, each awardee will receive a commemorative trophy and certificate recognizing excellence in their respective award category. The award will reflect the recipient’s unique contribution to promoting One District One Product (ODOP) and will be customized according to the specific category.
Non-Eligible Applicants under the ODOP Awards:
Private companies, individual artisans, and businesses cannot apply directly.
NGOs are not eligible to apply for the awards.
Select your category: Individual or Organization.
Individual: Name, Date of Birth, Nominator Type, Mobile, Email, Aadhaar Number.
Organization: Type, Authorized Person Name, Date of Birth, Organization Description, Designation, Mobile, Email, Aadhaar Number.
to the portal using your registered credentials.
Select the scheme from the list of awards and click
Fill in all mandatory fields in the online application form.
Click Submit to complete your application.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Registration:** **Step 1:** Visit the o[fficial website](https://awards.gov.in/) and click on the[ Registration button.](https://awards.gov.in/Registration/SignUp) **Step 2:** Select your category: Individual or Organization. **Step 3:** Fill in the required details: Individual: Name, Date of Birth, Nominator Type, Mobile, Email, Aadhaar Number. Organization: Type, Authorized Person Name, Date of Birth, Organization Description, Designation, Mobile, Email, Aadhaar Number. **Step 4:** Click Submit to complete registration. **Apply:** **Step 1:** [Log in](https://awards.gov.in/Login) to the portal using your registered credentials. **Step 2:** Select the scheme from the list of awards and click ["Nominate / Apply Now".](https://awards.gov.in/Home/AwardLibrary) **Step 3:** Fill in all mandatory fields in the online application form. **Step 4:** Click Submit to complete your application.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. All States/ UTs, Districts, Indian Missions Abroad, E-Commerce platforms, and Central Ministries/departments are eligible for the award. 1. The applications will be considered valid for the progress achieved in the promotion of the identified product from the respective district identified under DPIIT’s ODOP initiative only. The [list of products ](https://static.investindia.gov.in/s3fs-public/2025-07/v31_odop_product_list_20250702.pdf)identified under the initiative can be accessed.
